name: TRIAL-OPPORTUNISTIC_INSIDER-forward
hypothesis: Long large/mid-cap stocks with a non-routine (Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski) open-market insider PURCHASE filed recently; low-turnover ~12mo hold.
expected_effect: BRAIN-003 (2006-2024): large/mid +17 bps/mo vs EW (t=1.40), FF5+UMD alpha +102 bps/mo (t=1.89), post-2015 t=1.30; NULL in microcap. Leak-checked (noise gross|t|<3). Weak POSITIVE PRIOR — does not clear deploy gate (DSR 0.26).
kill_condition: net t<1 both cap segments = kill; noise gross|t|>=3 = leak void
